I spoke to Miles. He said it is up to JEE but knows
he likes the seating in the RibTec.ï¿½ The
seats/storage boxes can be bought and placed after
and no decision needs to be made now. They are not
part of the deck.ï¿½ Sometime during construction
someone can take the plan view and sketch in the
locations.

ï¿½

Underwater lights will be increased to 4.
